# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global Plugin Configurations
plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://example1.com"
        - "https://example2.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
  - name: authentication
    enabled: true
    config:
      # Configure the authentication plugin to use a specific strategy
      strategy: jwt
      # Configure the JWT token issuer and audience
      issuer: "https://example.com"
      audience: "https://example.com/api"
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      # Configure the rate limiting plugin to use a specific strategy
      strategy: sliding-window
      # Configure the rate limiting window size and interval
      window_size: 100
      window_interval: 60

# Service Plugin Configurations
services:
  - name: my-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://example3.com"
            - "https://example4.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
      - name: authentication
        enabled: true
        config:
          strategy: jwt
          issuer: "https://example.com"
          audience: "https://example.com/api"
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          strategy: sliding-window
          window_size: 100
          window_interval: 60

# Route Plugin Configurations
routes:
  - name: my-route
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://example5.com"
            - "https://example6.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
      - name: authentication
        enabled: true
        config:
          strategy: jwt
          issuer: "https://example.com"
          audience: "https://example.com/api"
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          strategy: sliding-window
          window_size: 100
          window_interval: 60
